decisions.decision_path: read AFI Vision → read Architecture → read Memetropolis Intelligence → read Session 17 Recap → compile 13-section PDF via reportlab

steps.node: Neural Net/Claude Memory/V2 Feature Set & Marathons

decisions.query: Fix Neural Net backlinks — graph shows orphan nodes
decisions.decision_path: audit all 133 files → identify orphans → add bidirectional wikilinks to 15 core files → create Session_Logs INDEX → create hierarchical Deprecated indexes

steps.node: Neural Net/Claude Memory/V2 Feature Set & Marathons
Neural Net/Claude Memory/V2 Feature Set & Marathons

decisions.query: Rename Owen to Issuer across entire codebase
decisions.decision_path: impact scan (298 occurrences) → rename issuers.ts → bulk sed replacements across 16 files → DB migration 012 → update skills → update Neural Net docs → regenerate white paper

decisions.query: Debug LayerZero 2-hop quoteSend revert on zkSync
decisions.decision_path: identify error 0x6780cfaf → decode as InvalidWorkerId(0) → check DVN existence → found deadDVN → overcomplicated → need to check if OTHER projects successfully use LZ on zkSync

decisions.query: Debug and fix LayerZero 2-hop bridge (zkSync → Arbitrum → Base)
decisions.decision_path: detect deposit → fee sweep → approve OFT → quoteSend reverts InvalidWorkerId(0) → wrong DVN address → fix DVN → still fails → wrong options length 0x0011 vs 0x0021 → FIX → quoteSend SUCCESS → LZ send → DVN verified → executor delivers → Arb adapter had 0 USDC → fund adapter → DELIVERED

decisions.query: Wire HyperEVM CCTP into bridge system
decisions.decision_path: research HyperEVM CCTP support → confirmed domain 19, chain 999 → already in bridge.ts CCTP_CHAIN_MAP → missing from monitor.ts CHAINS → add to monitor → add block explorer link

decisions.query: Wire remaining LZ chains (Celo, Gnosis, BSC) with correct DVN addresses
decisions.decision_path: fetch DVN addresses from LZ metadata API → discover Gnosis uses UNIQUE infra (standard addresses are EOAs!) → discover BSC uses unique ReceiveUln302 + Executor → create LZ_INFRA registry with per-chain addresses → add 6 bidirectional connections → refactor existing connections to use LZ_INFRA constants

decisions.query: Fix waitForArbUsdc timeout — monitor quits before LZ delivery arrives
decisions.decision_path: identified 300s (5min) timeout → LZ delivery takes 10-20min depending on DVN verification → increased to 1200s (20min) → added progressive logging with elapsed/remaining timer → changed poll interval from 5s to 10s to reduce RPC calls

decisions.query: Integrate Chris's frontend design files without destroying backend
decisions.decision_path: unzip Chris's files → diff 155 modified + 17 new → categorize Tier 1 (new, safe), Tier 2 (UI updates), Tier 3 (conflicts) → Tier 3 audit: ALL stale, zero new design → copy Tier 1+2 only → skip all backend-touching files → DESIGN_MODE was true (bypassing auth!) → disable it → wire Settings Cards to real API

decisions.query: Fix withdrawal system — execute on-chain, prevent double-spend, add cancellation
decisions.decision_path: audit POST /withdrawals → intent-only, no execution → add deployer wallet USDC transfer on Base → add estimateGas + 30% buffer → discover concurrent withdrawal race condition → add SELECT...FOR UPDATE atomic lock → add rate limiting (1/5min) → add DELETE /withdrawals/:id cancellation → sanitize error messages

decisions.query: Fix Solana shared deposit address — all users getting same address
decisions.decision_path: vault audit → discover generateSolanaDepositAddress() uses CONFIG.SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY alone (no userId) → all users share ONE address → add SHA-512(masterKey + userId) per-user derivation → update deposit-addresses endpoint → add sweep step in solanaBridgeAndForward → backwards compatible (no userId = master wallet)

git pull aborted (VPS had uncommitted package.json/yarn.lock) → stash + pull → tsx missing (crash loop, 19 restarts) → add tsx to runtime deps → migration 021 failed (agents.id is UUID not VARCHAR on prod) → fix FK types → deploy succeeded but reconcile throws (agent_bets.pnl column missing) → migration 022 adds settlement columns idempotently → reconcile success, last_reconciled_at populated

decisions.query: Manual run of gate-completeness-audit — prove the scheduled sub-agent output format + establish baseline
decisions.decision_path: scheduled task won't fire until Sunday 2026-04-19 → produce first artifact manually today → covers the last 7 days (2026-04-10 → 2026-04-17) → scan ~40 commits → identify 12 risky additions → cross-reference gates.yaml → 10 gated + 2 findings (both LOW-SEV read-only/DB-only) → overall health healthy

decisions.query: Live deposit pipeline under investor-day pressure — debug and harden in one session
decisions.decision_path: baseline working (38 past txs on 6 chains) → user $0.10 Base deposit silently dropped → discovered monitor only polled cached deposit_addresses (not derived) → fix: derive from users table → deploy 768fbd1 → next $0.25 detected but bridge fails NETWORK_ERROR → discovered Base publicnode URL typo ('base-mainnet-rpc' vs 'base-rpc') → fix + deploy fe5c5ef → bridge succeeds (tx 0xe45af020) → repeat $0.10 test silently skipped → discovered processDeposit dedup had no time window → fix + deploy 8289573 → repeat same-amount test STILL skipped → discovered pollChain inflight check ALSO had no time window (separate dedup layer) → fix + deploy 2c3f213 → $0.17 (aggregated $0.10+$0.07) bridged successfully → admin panel 38→41 on-chain txs, volume $6.33→$6.75

steps.node: Nuro-Finance/src/monitor.ts (derive-from-users + 2 dedup time windows + 1 inflight window)
Neural Net/Sub-Agents/ (scaffold with INDEX + conflict-resolution + orchestrator + 2 new agent docs + D3 generator)

decisions.query: Diagnose $40,000,000,000 BSC pending transaction on admin console and fix the underlying bug
decisions.decision_path: boot → scanned admin console → flagged $40B BSC row as suspected decimals-parse bug → read monitor.ts pollChain:200 → confirmed hardcoded `decimals = 6` applied to all 23 chains → read bridge.ts and identified second decimals bug in waitForArbUsdc → SSH-investigate: psql query confirmed DB row (user_id 72459d0e, user_wallet 0x75Aa3B70…, amount=40000000000, fee=2000000000, pending) → on-chain BSC check confirmed USDC decimals=18 (Binance-Peg), real balance 2e15 ($0.002 remaining from original $0.04 deposit) → math reconciled: BSC raw 4e16 formatted with 6-dec hardcode = '40000000000.0' → Arb deployer balance check showed $0.03801 (= 38010 raw 6-dec) → conclusion: LZ OFT hop SUCCEEDED, bridge stuck in waitForArbUsdc waiting for impossible 3.8e16 target → patched monitor.ts (DECIMALS_BY_CHAIN map + getChainDecimals helper used by pollChain and seedLastSeenFromDb) + bridge.ts (scale forwardAmount to Arb's 6-dec before waitForArbUsdc and cctpArbitrumToBase) + scripts/manual-sweep-arb-to-base.ts → pre-push gate passed (75 unit tests) → pushed 918c105 → VPS git pull blocked by dirty tree (POLL_INTERVAL_MS sed-edit for 60s active polling — 3rd time this session-class friction) → stash/pull/pop/restart succeeded → BUT mid-restart, new $2B pending BSC row appeared from same deposit address dust (monitor lastSeen reset, detected $0.002 dust as new deposit) → OLD code re-triggered cascade before restart → NEW code deployed but sweep script blocked by Arb deployer out-of-gas (have 0.0000046 ETH, want 0.000154 ETH) → user paused session to nap before fund+sweep completion

Nuro-Finance/src/bridge.ts (scale forwardAmount source→Arb 6-dec inside LZ two-hop path)

decisions.query: Investigate why FE rebuild fails with 'Cannot find package next-intl' and fix the underlying package.json / migration bug permanently
decisions.decision_path: FE rebuild attempt post-yarn→npm migration → `./node_modules/.bin/next` missing → `npm install --no-save next@15.5.14 react react-dom` as quick test → build advanced then died on next-intl missing → root-cause investigation via package.json + git history → discovered package.json has NEVER declared next/react/react-dom/next-intl/35+ other FE packages in any of Object.keys(package.json) → yarn.lock (pre-c578c18) HAD them because Yarn Berry v4 tolerates undeclared deps if they appear in the lockfile → npm strict-purge after migration exposed the latent bug → spawned Explore agent to inventory all external imports across src/{app,components,features,hooks,providers,layouts,store,lib,services,i18n} + config files → 41 runtime packages + 9 build-time packages identified → versions extracted from git-historical yarn.lock via scripts/extract-yarn-versions.js (block-parser handles aggregate keys) → package.json updated with proper dependencies/devDependencies split → built verify-deps.js gate: scans every .ts/.tsx/.js/.jsx + next.config.js + postcss.config.mjs + tailwind.config.mjs for external imports, cross-checks declared in package.json → wired into .husky/pre-push AND .github/workflows/backend-ci.yml so the failure mode is impossible to reintroduce locally OR server-side → local verify-deps run passed: 54/54 declared

steps.node: Nuro-Finance/src/app, components, features, hooks, providers, layouts, store, lib, services, i18n, auth.ts, middleware.ts (via Explore agent)

decisions.query: Scout high-value Claude Code skills and npm libraries to adopt — ranked by AFI-specific ROI and integration cost
decisions.decision_path: Session 22 Hour 3 — after shipping Sprint 6.1 (silent-skip telemetry), 6.2 (dedup consolidation), and 6.3 (POLL_INTERVAL_MS env + DECIMALS_BY_CHAIN registry + dirty-tree gate + /deployer skill rewrite), spawned a claude-code-guide research agent to inventory high-value additions across two axes (Claude Code skills + npm libs). Constrained scope to picks that: (a) address pain points we hit live tonight, (b) skip anything Richard already has, (c) exclude anything requiring >1 day to integrate in a pre-investor sprint.

steps.node: Research-only, no files modified. Research agent returned ranked picks.

decisions.query: Wrap-up hour — complete Options A/B/C in parallel: finish hook wiring, ship Sprint 6.4 mid-restart safety, debug MCPs
decisions.decision_path: After Session 22's main wrap (10 commits, Marathon 6 Sprints 6.1/6.2/6.3 shipped) Richard had another hour. Three tracks: A) wire remaining hooks (/auditor, /gate-check, /balances), B) Sprint 6.4 graceful-shutdown safety, C) debug MCP postgres+github. Executed in parallel: SSH key auth established (Windows → VPS passwordless), 2 automation hooks live (Stop auto-pause polling + SessionStart vps-health check) from earlier in session, added 2 more hooks for /auditor on git push + /gate-check on .env edits via agent hook type. Sprint 6.4 added SIGTERM handler in index.ts that marks pending txs older than 30s as failed_restart, boot-time reconciler in monitor.ts that warns on incomplete bridges, dedup.ts handles failed_restart as stale-retry-eligible. MCP debug: rotated fresh GitHub PAT via claude mcp remove+add, verified SSH tunnel alive, all 3 MCPs (postgres/filesystem/github) confirmed ✓ Connected.
